name: Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the butter for 30 seconds using an electric mixer.
3. Add peanut butter and sugars to the butter mixture; beat until fluffy.
4. Add egg and vanilla extract; beat well.
5. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet ingredients; beat until well combined.
6. Shape dough into 1-inch balls, rolling them in granulated sugar if desired.
7. Place cookies about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Crisscross the cookies with the tines of a fork.
9. Bake at 375°F for 9-10 minutes.
10. Cool about 1 minute before removing to a wire rack.
Makes approximately 48 cookies. For an alternative, place chocolate candy kisses in the center of each cookie without crisscrossing first. Simply bake as directed, and once removed from the oven, press the unwrapped candies into the cooled cookies for a chocolate center.
